caption: A man with a beard, wearing a dark grey vest over a light-colored shirt, is speaking into a microphone labeled "ANI" in an outdoor setting with green trees and a white fence in the background. News overlays occupy the top and bottom of the screen. The top banner features the text "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" alongside the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. Small portrait photos of other men, labeled "मंत्री संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार," appear on the right side, while a photo of "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" is on the left. A bright yellow and red "BREAKING NEWS" banner runs across the bottom, accompanied by a time stamp of "10:02 PM." Throughout the sequence, the man continues to speak, with slight variations in his facial expression and head posture as he addresses the interviewer.
